race.comment: The Waterhouse/Bott mares should be peaking for this. Leaning to BELLA MONTAGNA (13) who is probably the one with more upside. Made up a lot of ground to finish second last start over 2100m at Gosford (metro). Won under 57kgs on a heavy track over this trip at Rosehill last prep. Biggest test to date but on the limit she is worth the gamble. ALALCANCE (3) tired late after a mid-race move last time out in the 2000m Chairman's at Doomben. That was her first outing since the Group 1 Ranvet eight weeks earlier. Likes it wet so watch for a far more resilient effort here. ROYAL SUPREMACY (2) won the Metrop over this distance in the Spring and showed he was getting back to that form when third to MIDDLE EARTH last start. HIGHLAND BLING (9) has been knocking on the door throughout this campaign. Have to respect.
